title: MATANA 25 Premium White Plastic Dinner Plates with Gold Rim, 26cm / 10 Inch - Elegant & Reusable Party Plates for Weddings, Birthdays, Picnic, BBQ, Parties
features: ELEGANT DESIGN: Our premium white plastic plates with gold rim are designed to add an elegant touch to any event. The gold edge adds a touch of luxury and sophistication, making them ideal for formal occasions. The design is elegant and stylish, allowing them to complement a variety of table settings.

PERFECT SIZE: With a diameter of 26 cm, these plastic dinner plates are generously sized and offer plenty of space for your food. Whether you are serving a main course or a selection of starters, these plastic plates are sure to meet your needs.

VERSATILE USE: Our gold plates are not limited to formal events. They are also ideal for casual gatherings, outdoor picnics and even everyday use. You can use them for a wide range of events including christenings, baby showers, Christmas and more.

DURABLE PP PLASTIC – Made from high-quality polypropylene (PP), these plates are sturdy, heat-resistant, and intentionally designed with slight flexibility to make them virtually unbreakable. Unlike brittle PS plastics, PP ensures both safety and durability.

HAND WASH RECOMMENDED: Although our premium plastic plates are dishwasher safe, hand washing is recommended to preserve their elegant design and gold rim. Please avoid using harsh cleaning agents or prolonged soaking to maintain their beauty.
description: Product Description Elegance Redefined Indulge in sophistication with our Plastic White & Gold tableware, ideal for main courses, starters, desserts, and appetizers. Each piece brings an elegant touch to your dining experience. Premium Quality Immerse yourself in quality and durability. Our shatterproof design ensures a premium feel, perfect for all occasions—weddings, birthdays, formal events, or a simple outdoor BBQ or picnic. Versatile Glamour Unleashed From weddings to casual gatherings, our tableware adds glamour effortlessly. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, it's the ideal choice for christenings, Christmas, birthdays, and more. Celebrate in style, anytime, anywhere. Wash and Reuse Our white and gold tableware are reusable, making them a sustainable choice. After your event, cleaning them is a breeze – simply wash them with mild soap and warm water, and they're ready for your next gathering. Previous page Wedding Make your wedding venue a masterpiece with Matana's stunning tableware collection. Picnic Brighten up your picnic spread with our range of tableware. Party Matana Plates and Bowls bring style, functionality, and elegance to your dining table.
